text.content:
Stress and Simple Dice

Roll a d10. Results of 1–9 are face value; 0 (shown as 10 on the die) triggers special stress rules including botch checks and explosions on further 1s.

Characteristics & Abilities

Add the relevant score to your die roll. Abilities with a specialty grant +1 when applicable.

Confidence

Spend Confidence to re-roll or improve outcomes per saga agreement.

Attack & Defense

Attack = Weapon Atk Bonus + Dex + Attack Skill. Defense = Parry Bonus + Parry Skill − Size. Dodge = Dodge + Qik − Enc − Size.

Damage

Damage = Weapon Damage + Str + Attack Skill, compared against Soak.

Wounds & Fatigue

Track body levels and fatigue levels on the Combat tab of your character sheet.

Formulaic Spells

Casting Modifier = Technique + Form + Stamina. Roll stress die + modifier vs spell Level.

If the total meets or exceeds the spell level, the spell succeeds without Fatigue loss. Otherwise lose one Fatigue level.

Formulaic Spells Compendium

The Formulaic Spells (ArM5 Index) compendium contains spell names, arts, and levels from Ars Magica Fifth Edition, Appendix III: Spells Index, made available under the Ars Magica Open License via Project: Redcap.

Index entries do not include full range, duration, or target parameters — add those from your saga's rulebooks as needed. General (Gen) spells are marked accordingly.

Based on Ars Magica material ©1993–2024, licensed by Trident, Inc. d/b/a Atlas Games®, under CC-BY-SA 4.0. Ars Magica, Mythic Europe, and related marks are trademarks of Trident, Inc., used with permission.

Arms & Armor Compendium

The Arms & Armor (LoM) compendium contains melee weapons, missile weapons, body armor, and surcoats/greaves from the Lords of Men supplement Arms & Armor, made available under the Ars Magica Open License via Project: Redcap.

Statistics are mapped to this system's 2e combat fields (Speed, Atk, Damage, Parry) for convenience. ArM5-only details (ability category, damage types, availability period) are preserved on each item. Layer body armor, surcoats, and helmets per the supplement rules when building outfits.

Based on Ars Magica material ©1993–2024, licensed by Trident, Inc. d/b/a Atlas Games®, under CC-BY-SA 4.0. Ars Magica, Mythic Europe, and related marks are trademarks of Trident, Inc., used with permission.
